name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-45
title: feature.json status field exists in spec but not in feature.json
description: spec.md frontmatter declares status: active. feature.json (in this feature) does not have a top-level 'status' field. tdd-context.py reads it as data.get('status'). Either add status to feature.json (canonical schema), or remove status from tdd-context.py output. Currently consumers reading the context get null.
